seo.description: Score Buddy makes it easy to track points during your board game sessions. No more pen and paper—follow your scores in real time and keep a history of your games.

androidApp.title: Get the app
androidApp.message: Score Buddy is available on the Play Store for a better experience on Android.

account.title: Account
account.createAccountPrompt: Create an account to save your game history and player profiles.
account.duelModeTooltip: For 2-player games, displays the score cards face to face. It's recommend to enabling Keep screen on when using this mode.
account.duelModeTooltipNoWakeLock: For 2-player games, displays the score cards face to face.
account.logoutConfirmMessage: You will need to log in again to access your saved games and players.
account.syncedMessage: Your data is up to date.

login.title: Log in
login.importMessage: You have games and/or saved players stored on this device. Do you want to add them to your account?
login.syncErrorMessage: Could not fetch your saved data.
login.importErrorMessage: Could not import your local data.

signup.title: Sign up
signup.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.
signup.checkInboxMessage: Confirm your email address to finish creating your account.

game.endGameMessage: You're about to end the game.
game.endRoundMessage: You're about to end the current round.
game.resetOrCancelMessage: Do you want to reset (all points will be set to min score) or cancel (game will be deleted no winner will be declared) the game?
game.startNewGame: Do you want to start a new one?

newGame.title: New Game
newGame.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 1 characters.
newGame.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 64 characters.
newGame.startScoreMin: Start score must be at least {min}.
newGame.endingScoreMin: Ending score must be at least {min}.
newGame.endingScoreDifferent: Ending score should be different than start score.
newGame.winningRoundsMin: Winning rounds must be at least 1.

gamesHistory.title: History
gamesHistory.replayCurrentCanceled: Your current game will be canceled without being saved. Do you want to continue?
gamesHistory.replayStartNew: Do you want to start a new game with the same settings and your current lobby?

room.title: Room
room.cantRemovePlayer: You can't remove player while a game is in progress.
room.removePlayerMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this player?
room.endRoomMessage: Are you sure you want to end the lobby?
room.resetRoomMessage: Are you sure you want to reset the lobby? All games will be lost.

addPlayer.title: Add player
addPlayer.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters.
addPlayer.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 20 characters.
addPlayer.playerAddedMessage: {name} has been added to the lobby.

userGamesHistory.title: History
userGamesHistory.logInPrompt: Log in to see the history of every game played on your account, across all devices.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.body: Score Buddy ("the app") respects your privacy. This page explains what data we collect, how it is used, and your rights regarding that data.

dataCollected.title: Data we collect
dataCollected.account: Account data: if you create an account, we collect your email address and password (handled securely by our authentication provider, Supabase) to let you log in.
dataCollected.gameData: Game data: game history, scores, and player profile names that you enter while using the app, so they can be synced to your account when you are logged in.
dataCollected.localData: Local data: if you do not create an account, your game history and preferences are stored only on your device and are never sent to our servers.

dataUse.title: How we use your data
dataUse.body: Your data is used solely to provide the app's features: tracking scores, keeping a history of your games, and syncing that history across your devices when you are logged in. We do not use your data for advertising and we do not run analytics or tracking SDKs in the app.

dataSharing.title: Data sharing
dataSharing.body: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties. Account and game data are stored with Supabase, our backend and authentication provider, which acts solely as our data processor.

dataRetention.title: Data retention
dataRetention.body: Your account and game data are kept for as long as your account exists. You can request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time by contacting us.

security.title: Security
security.body: We rely on industry-standard security practices provided by Supabase, including encrypted connections, to protect your data.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: You may access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. You can delete game data from within the app, or request full account deletion by contacting us.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.body: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or your data, you can contact us at:
